en: I'm sorry you and Angie broke up, but are you going to sit here sulking or are you going to call her?
ko: 너랑 Angie가 헤어져서 안됐는데, 여기 앉아서 삐져 있을 거야 아니면

en: I'm not calling her, guys. Why not? Because if I was her, I wouldn't take me back either.
ko: 내가 걔라도 나를 다시 받아주지 않을 거니까.

en: I was really a jerk to her.
I was selfish and I was too afraid to be vulnerable and lost her.
ko: 이기적이었고, 솔직해지는 게 너무 무서워서 걔를 잃었어.

en: John, that was beautiful. Just tell her that. Yeah, man.
She would really appreciate hearing that.
ko: 걔도 그 말 들으면 진짜 고마워할 거야.

en: Just give her a call, buddy. Tell her what you told us.
ko: 전화 한번 해봐. 우리한테 한 말 그대로 해. 여보세요?

en: Hello? Hey. Angie.
It's me. Yeah, it's John. F*** you.
What? F*** you. No! Why are you saying that? What am I doing, dude? I'm freaking out.
ko: 안 돼. 왜 그런 말을 해?

en: Say what you said earlier. Say something else. The be vulnerable thing. Go f*** yourself.
No. Oh, no. I never liked you in the first place, girly. What did she say?
ko: 애초에 선택받을 자격 없어. 걔가 뭐라는 거야?

en: You got to bail me out. You want me to talk to her? Bail me out. Talk to her. Talk to her. Tell her I'm sorry. Please.
Hi, Angie. Hey. Sorry. I don't know what's going on. F*** you. No!
Oh, my God. F*** you, loser. No! You mind doing it too? Yes.
I hate all of what you're working with. Don't! What is going on? Get off the phone!
Angie, I don't know what's going on with those guys. I love you. F*** you. Come on, man.
It's my ex-girlfriend. Give me the phone. Angie, it's me.
Um, I'm really sorry. Oh, dude. It's on mute. Oh, oops.
F*** you, dude. Why are you so off today? Angie.
ko: 왜 우리 오늘 이 모양이야? 젠장, Angie.

en: She hung up on me. Wow. Are you serious? Very mature.
Blew it again with the love of my life.
Yeah, blew it with my last girlfriend, too, by getting my penis stuck in her toilet.
Just like I blew it with Stevie. Every time we had sex, I'd say, Aichi, wah-wah.
She did not like that. But Angie wasn't like your ugly girlfriend.
She was as warm as a summer night.
As sweet as a song. She was...
ko: 노래처럼 달콤한... 세상에, 걔가 올라오고 있어.

en: Oh my God, she's on her way up. You motherf***er!
Angie! No, no, no! Angie! Angie! Angie!
Angie!
